company.title: About the Company
company.industryDetail: Manufacturing and processing of zipper bags and household plastic products: floor mats, table mats, cutting boards, anti-slip nets, drawer mats, baseboards, storage boxes, and more.
company.timelineTaiwan: 1983 — Jhonsin Taiwan (the parent company) was founded, starting from material research and product development.
company.timelineStage1: Stage 1 (2023) — Evaluated expansion investment and selected the factory site at An Phuoc Industrial Park, An Phuoc Commune, Dong Nai.
company.timelineStage2: Stage 2 (October 2024) — Formalized the organization and built the GMP quality documentation system.
company.heritageDetail: Established in 1983, Jhonsin Taiwan has built capabilities across material research, product design and manufacturing. Jhonsin Vietnam carries this commitment to innovation and quality into its operations in Vietnam.
company.why1: Safe working environment, compliant with ISO, IWAY, C-TPAT
company.why2: Full social insurance and benefits as required by law
company.why4: Convenient location at An Phuoc Industrial Park, Dong Nai

products.title: Houseware Products
products.intro: Practical houseware ranges, from food storage to organizing everyday living spaces.

capabilities.title: Manufacturing Capabilities
capabilities.intro: From material research to finished products, Jhonsin develops integrated capabilities for quality and efficiency.
capabilities.materialsText: The Jhonsin Group develops customized plastic material formulas (PS, PP, PE) to meet each customer's specific needs and improve product competitiveness.
capabilities.designText: Our design team develops products to customer requirements, builds samples from customer drawings and provides professional technical advice. The Jhonsin Group has partnered with international brands such as IKEA, H&M HOME and ZARA on design and manufacturing.
capabilities.manufacturingText: From plastic sheet and roll extrusion (PS, PP, PE) to finished products, the Jhonsin Group continuously improves processes and equipment to maintain consistent quality across its manufacturing operations.
capabilities.qualityText: Working toward satisfied customers, engaged colleagues and sustainable business operations.
capabilities.sourceNote: Material research, design and manufacturing capability information is based on Jhonsin Taiwan (the parent company, founded in 1983) — the foundation Jhonsin Vietnam carries forward.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Connect with Jhonsin Vietnam to learn more about partnership and career opportunities.
